hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | grep -qE '\.(svelte|ts|js|css)$|svelte\.config\.|vite\.config\.|package\.json|tsconfig\.json' && echo '{"systemMessage":"Reminder: if this change affects project structure, tooling, or conventions, update CLAUDE.md to reflect it."}' || true
